notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for qatar. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for Qatar
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to Qatar, VIZA AI should consider the Hayya e-visa route, usually Tourist Visa A1 unless another Hayya category fits better. First confirm nationality, stay length, accommodation, GCC residence or eligible third-country visas, and whether the trip is tourism or visit. Check Hayya categories before assuming A1. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: Qatar Hayya official platform and categories
chunks.content: Qatar Ministry of Interior visa pages and Qatar Tourism materials describe Hayya as the e-platform used to streamline tourist visa applications for visitors to Qatar. Qatar Tourism says Hayya is Qatar's official e-visa digital platform and includes categories such as Tourist Visa (A1), GCC Resident Visa (A2), Visa with ETA (A3), Companion of GCC Citizen Visa (A4), and other visitor categories. VIZA AI should route generic tourism to A1 only after checking whether another category fits better.

chunks.title: Qatar tourist visa document direction
chunks.content: For Qatar tourist visa advice, collect passport nationality, passport validity, travel dates, accommodation/hotel booking, host details if applicable, and whether mandatory visitor health insurance applies. Tell users to apply through the official Hayya portal or app and to monitor approval before travel; airline boarding and border entry remain subject to official checks.

documents.title: Qatar Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Qatar application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Qatar Hayya portal/app Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://portal.moi.gov.qa/qatarvisas/. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Qatar fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality/residence, travel dates, accommodation, Hayya category, contact details and GCC/ETA eligibility data if relevant

chunks.title: Qatar supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport, photo, accommodation, health insurance where required and supporting visa/residence evidence for A2/A3 categories Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for qatar.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://portal.moi.gov.qa/qatarvisas/

Passport and identity fields:
- Crawler reached official or authorized source URLs, but did not extract a concise field-specific sentence. Keep this country's field answers constrained to official forms, passport data, and source URLs already listed in the country RAG seed.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
